title: BuildOrderTrajectory
description: Time-gated build-order trajectory consumed by the Phase D build-order reward. Parallel to bots/current/build_orders.py::BuildStep (supply-gated, in-game sequencer) -- this schema is time-gated and scores edit-distance vs. the bot's actual build during a game.

name.description: Human-readable trajectory label (matches the filename stem).

tolerance_seconds.description: Half-width of the timing match window used by edit-distance scoring in D.3.

target.description: Unit / structure / upgrade name. Convention: lowercase, no separators except for upgrade ids which use snake_case (e.g. 'pylon', 'gateway', 'cyberneticscore', 'roboticsfacility', 'warp_gate_research'). D.3 normalizes the bot's CamelCase BuildStep.target (e.g. 'CyberneticsCore') to this canonical form before edit-distance scoring.

time_seconds.description: Game-clock seconds at which this target should be reached.

weight.description: Per-step weight applied to edit-distance scoring in D.3.
